top_signals.title: Stocks Climb, Oil Retreats on Iran Peace Deal: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Stocks and Treasuries rallied while oil dropped to a three-month low after the US and Iran reached a deal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, easing concerns over energy-supply disruptions that have roiled global markets.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Trump-backed World Liberty Financial to fund UFC fighter bonuses in USD1 stablecoin at White House event
top_signals.summary: The deal puts USD1 branding inside the Octagon at an event held on the White House South Lawn, on President Trump's 80th birthday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
